name: VCBVmem
description: Extends the Virtual Circuit Board VMem address space from 20-bit (1,048,576 words) to 24-bit (16,777,216 words) — 16× more addressable memory at no cost to word width (still 32-bit). The address-bits spinbox now goes up to 24. Pure GDScript, loads at runtime, never replaces vcb.pck; coexists with other mods.
